titles: Living With a Cat Be Like... 🐾
captions: Can’t Taste Sweet. Explains the attitude.
Steals Your Toy. Immediately Buries It.
narrations: Cats will sprint across the room at full speed in the dead of night because they’re convinced it’s the African savanna
Cats can’t taste sweet flavors which means their smugness has zero justification but they play it like a CEO
Cats will drag their most impressive kill (a dead grasshopper) to you like you’re their personal trash disposal service
Cats will lock eyes with you for entire conversations because they’re debating if you’re human or just a snack-sized mammal
Cats will rhythmically stomp your chest with their claws like you’re a stress ball they own and also a rawhide toy
Cats will snatch your favorite toy then hide it under the couch like they’re hoarding treasures for a post-apocalyptic cat utopia
Cats sleep half your workday but never miss an opportunity to sit in your lap during Zoom meetings as a passive-aggressive reminder of their existence
Cats will snuggle with you until they’re warm and satisfied then leave you with cold hands and unanswered questions about their commitment to love
